Tech Used

If you need to know the specs first before buying, here you go!

  • Eleventy
  • Markdown
  • Bootstrap
  • Pagefind

What's special about the SpaceClub! Template

SpaceClub! is designed so you can own a good looking website that you can take anywhere and you can easily edit. Here is how:

Take it Anywhere

SpaceClub! is a static site template. That means you can copy the template to your laptop, make changes, build, and then view your website! It also means you can take your website anywhere, and there are a ton of easy and/or free options on where to put it (i.e. host) on the web.

Easy to Edit

Since the template is built using Eleventy, editing content is easy! It's not drag and drop but you also don't need to learn a bunch of HTML. All the pages are easy to read and because it's markdown, you can type normal text and it will show on your website!

Good Looking Website

By using Bootstrap,

In Conclusion

SpaceClub! template is really an Eleventy theme to be honest. However, so much design options, components and features has been added that it really became its own thing instead.
